title: Coimbatore TVK MLAs say they will back Vijay 'whatever Delhi decides'
summary: All TVK MLAs from Coimbatore district held an internal huddle on May 8 and resolved to back party chief Vijay's stand on government formation, irrespective of pressure from national parties.

title: Coimbatore Bar Association moots PIL on delay in inviting single largest party
summary: A section of the Coimbatore Bar Association said it is examining filing a PIL in the Madras High Court over the Governor's delay in inviting the single largest party to form the government.

title: New FASTag rules trigger long queues at Neelambur and Madukkarai toll plazas
summary: Tighter NHAI norms on FASTag balance and number-plate matching led to long queues at Neelambur and Madukkarai toll plazas on the Coimbatore bypass through May 8 morning.

title: Coimbatore women self-help groups seek clarity on ₹1,000 monthly scheme
summary: Federation of women self-help groups in Coimbatore has written to the incoming government seeking a written assurance that the Magalir Urimai Thogai will be retained.

title: CODISSIA flags political uncertainty as MSME orders slip in early May
summary: CODISSIA has reported a noticeable slowdown in fresh MSME orders in the first week of May, attributing part of the dip to political uncertainty around government formation.

title: Pollachi coconut farmers march to collectorate seeking MSP
summary: Pollachi-belt coconut farmers marched to the district collectorate on May 8 demanding a minimum support price as wholesale rates continue to slide ahead of the harvest peak.
